other_observers: Found by Abby Grier, Jim & Karen Schmoker, whom I observed the bird with.; Seen by many others, including Larry Semo, Doug Faulkner, Loch Kilptrick, and Todd Deininger
duration: On and off for about 3 1/2 hours
specific_location: Barr Lake State Park Nature Center Parking Lot, in picnic table and field immediately to the east, south of the ditch.
description: Small vibrant red flycatcher with black wings, nape, back, tail, and black mask. Two very faint white wing bars. Thin black bill.Behaviors: Hunting from mullein stalks and small cottonwoods, grabbing small moths on or near the ground.Call: not heardPlumage: Adult
